likes: QR use cases tied to Indian businesses
tool → industry → use case → pain point → CTA
Indian business examples with Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, WhatsApp and Google Maps where relevant
dislikes: content not tied to a BharathQR tool
content not tied to a BharathQR tool or commercial use case
rules: Founder feedback overrides generic SEO prompt defaults.
Every blog must map to a BharathQR tool, solution, use case, material, trust topic, comparison or template.
Every paragraph should naturally include search intent, business pain point, benefit and action wording without keyword stuffing.
Use daily Indian app keywords naturally when relevant: Google Pay, PhonePe, Paytm, BHIM, WhatsApp, Google Maps.
Crisp content beats long generic content.
Title must include the primary keyword.
First 100 words must include primary keyword, business keyword, pain point and benefit.
Every article must promote exactly one primary BharathQR tool.
Every article must include a clear CTA to the matching BharathQR page.
Use intent-rich paragraphs, not keyword stuffing.
content_framework: Primary keyword → pain point → tool solution → business use case → action CTA
target_positioning: India’s AI-powered QR and business growth platform for payments, reviews, WhatsApp, menus, WiFi, print materials and trust.
